rows.name: page_desc
rows.value: In this page we are going to discover some components

rows.name: text_1_1
rows.value: Create a text box in the page

rows.name: text_1_2
rows.value: Below the text box, put another component: a combo box where the user can choose one of three names.

rows.name: answer_list_1
text_1_3
rows.value: Make the combo box more interactive. The text entered in the input (text box) should also appear as an option in the combo box. Currently, the combo box contains only our names.

rows.name: text_1_4
rows.value: Hint: See line 63 of the component_combo_box spreadsheet.

rows.name: button_add
rows.action_list:
click | add_data | 

_list_id: comp_combo_box_items,
name: added_data_name,
text: @local.text_box_1

rows.name: text_2_1
rows.value: Add an image to each item, and when an item is selected, the image should appear below.

rows.name: text_2_2
rows.value: Hint: Use @items.column_name to get values, and @item.name == "name_3" to show a line only if the condition is true (quotes are required).
